name: mcpserver-cowork
description: Connect Claude Cowork to McpServer for marker-trusted TODO management, session logging, requirements tracking, GraphRAG operations, and local outage handoff recovery.

workspace_path.title: Workspace path
workspace_path.description: Absolute local path to the MCP workspace containing AGENTS-README-FIRST.yaml.

session_title.title: Session title
session_title.description: Default title used when the plugin opens a McpServer session log.
